nodes.name: Turquoise-throated barbet
nodes.summary: The turquoise-throated barbet (Psilopogon chersonesus) is an Asian barbet found in Thailand. The barbets get their name from the bristles which fringe their heavy bills; this species eats fruits and insects. It used to be considered a subspecies of the blue-throated barbet. References

nodes.name: Psilopogon
nodes.summary: Psilopogon（Psilopogon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联33种鸟类，如Malabar barbet、Crimson-fronted barbet、赤胸拟啄木鸟等33种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
